_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell RNA sequencing of neurofibromas reveals a tumor microenvironment favorable for neural regeneration and immune suppression in a neurofibromatosis type 1 porcine model.

_contextSnippet: Tumors also focally stained positive for neural cell origin markers GFAP and SOX10, particularly in areas of hypercellularity
details: Produced focal positive staining for neural cell origin markers, particularly in areas of hypercellularity within neurofibromas
